description_long: This object is a slender bird with a long, straight tail and a streamlined body. Its plumage is predominantly dark blue-gray, with subtle iridescent tones visible along the back and wings. The beak is long, slightly curved, and pale in color, contrasting with the darker head and body. The bird's legs are short and not prominently visible, suggesting they are tucked beneath the body. The tail is notably elongated and tapers to a fine point, giving the bird a distinctive silhouette. The overall appearance is sleek and elegant, with smooth feathering and a uniform color pattern.
description: A sleek, dark blue-gray bird with a long, pointed tail and a pale, slightly curved beak. Its body is streamlined and the plumage is smooth and uniform.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, long straight tail, and pale beak.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow body and the full length of the tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the long tail and beak, with subtle iridescence on the back.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the pointed beak and the symmetry of the head and tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid dark blue-gray with subtle iridescence and no distinct markings
